title: In-repo backups move under .bee/backups/, managed gitignore covers scratch, tracked .bak untracked (D1, D3, D4)
action: Per CONTEXT D1/D3/D4. (A) skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs — the TWO in-repo backup writers, merge_repo_hook_settings (~:3140) and merge_codex_hooks (~:3148), stop writing a sibling `<target>.bak` and instead write `<repoRoot>/.bee/backups/<relative-target-path>.<UTC-stamp>.bak` (e.g. .bee/backups/.claude/settings.json.20260721T134500Z.bak), creating dirs on demand; a second onboard must NOT destroy the first backup (that is why the stamp exists). The MACHINE-LEVEL writer at ~:3160 (~/.codex/config.toml.bak) is OUT OF SCOPE — leave it byte-untouched. (B) GITIGNORE_BLOCK_PATTERNS (~:102-130) gains: `.bee/backups/`, a pattern matching the atomic-tmp shape ONLY (the `<pid>-<ctr>-<rand>.tmp` suffix — a user's hand-made `notes.tmp` must stay VISIBLE to git), and the four plugin swap-dir patterns (.claude-plugin/skills.tmp-*/, .claude-plugin/skills.old-*/, .codex-plugin/skills.tmp-*/, .codex-plugin/skills.old-*/). Keep the block's existing comment style — explain WHY each pattern exists like the lockfile comment does. (C) The tests at skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs (~:662 settings.json.bak, ~:1025 config.toml.bak) pin the OLD locations: update the repo-level one to the new .bee/backups/ path, and assert the machine-level one is UNCHANGED. RED-FIRST: update/add the assertions first, run red, record --passed false, then implement. Also add: after apply, the managed block contains the new patterns; a hand-made `notes.tmp` is NOT ignored. (D) Untrack the committed backup: `git rm --cached .claude/settings.json.bak` and delete the file (it is a stale copy of a tracked file). Render + manifest. TARGETED verify only (test_onboard_bee.mjs) — no full chain.

truths: repo-level backups land under .bee/backups/ with a UTC stamp; a second onboard preserves the first
managed block contains .bee/backups/ + the atomic-tmp shape + the four swap-dir patterns after apply
a user's hand-made notes.tmp stays VISIBLE to git (pattern is not a greedy *.tmp)
.claude/settings.json.bak no longer appears in git ls-files
RED-FIRST failing run recorded before implementation
prohibitions: Never touch the machine-level backup writer or any path outside the repo
Never ignore a tracked deliverable (docs/**, .bee/cells, .bee/decisions.jsonl, plugin trees)
Do not delete a user's existing sibling .bak files as a migration — leave them, only stop creating new ones

trace.dropped_reason: re-scoped: user clarified the real problem is forgotten scratch/report files with no canonical home + no sweep, not .bak backups
